The wo_skills agent, lacking the skill, produced no URL and no platform capability information, making it impossible for the user to actually reach the platform they requested by name. Both runs scored well on constraint completeness (J3-2 through J3-5), but the absence of the platform URL in wo_skills is a critical failure for the core task: directing the user to the named tool they explicitly requested.
